name: Cheese and Spinach Borag
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Spinach; blanched, drained, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the blanched spinach, Monterey Jack cheese, cream cheese, first beaten egg, parsley, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper. Mix until well blended.
2. On a buttered flat baking pan, place 2 sheets of phyllo dough. Brush with melted butter. Repeat with remaining phyllo sheets until half are used. Spread the spinach-cheese mixture evenly on top.
3. Place 2 more sheets of phyllo dough on top and brush with melted butter. Continue to layer with phyllo sheets and butter until all are used.
4. Carefully slice the layers into squares.
5. In a small bowl, beat the milk and second egg together. Generously brush this mixture over the squares.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
